nodes.name: Dambo cisticola
nodes.summary: Dambo cisticola（Cisticola dambo）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dambo cisticola。

nodes.name: Dambo cisticola
nodes.summary: The dambo cisticola or cloud-scraping cisticola (Cisticola dambo) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Angola, the DRC and Zambia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical seasonally wet or flooded lowland grassland. References
